summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Coffee Grounds iteration 3 - Major UI redesign with header restructuring, hero section overhaul, contact form, and admin management features. All new features working correctly.
passed_tests: All 31 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
Admin login with test123/12345 credentials working
Contact form submission and data storage working
Navbar structure correct - no logo text, nav links on left, Sign In on right
Homepage hero with giant 'Coffee Grounds' title and correct subtitle
Featured Shops card displaying 5 shops on right side above fold
Scroll down indicator visible and functional
Contact page form with Name, Email, Message fields working
Admin dashboard with 3 tabs (Shops, Admins, Messages) working
All existing features still working: shop listings, search, sort, map, detail pages, ratings
